# task\-skeleton\-read\-commands — Widen skeleton: \`task list\` and \`task show\`
status: done  priority: 2  scope: scope-cli

Widen the read side of the skeleton by reusing the loader, schema, and index from task\-skeleton\-task\-next\. Add \`waystation task list\` and \`waystation task show \<id\>\` with stable, scriptable output\.

## Acceptance
- \`waystation task list\` lists tasks with their status\.
- \`waystation task show \<id\>\` shows one task, and errors cleanly on an unknown id\.
- Both commands support \`\-\-json\`\.
- No new storage or index layer is introduced — these commands reuse the core built in task\-skeleton\-task\-next\.
- bun:test covers list output and show\-by\-id including the not\-found case\.
